title: Apex Launches New Asia Growth Equity Strategy
content: Apex Asset Management announced the launch of its Asia Growth Equity Strategy, a focused fund targeting high-growth companies across Southeast Asia and emerging markets. The strategy already attracted $12 billion in commitments from institutional investors. The fund leverages Apex's 32 years of Asia expertise and on-ground research network across 12 regional offices.

title: Apex Global Bond Fund Delivers Strong 2026 Performance
content: Apex's Global Bond Fund achieved a year-to-date return of 5.2%, outperforming its benchmark index by 85 basis points. The fund's duration strategy and selective credit positioning drove outperformance amid volatile global rates environment. Assets under management in the bond fund reached $65 billion.

title: Apex Expands Singapore Hub with New Investment Office
content: Apex announced expansion of its Singapore headquarters with a new dedicated investment office housing 150 portfolio managers and research analysts. The expansion reflects Apex's commitment to deepening its Asia Pacific presence and supporting growing institutional demand for Asia-focused solutions across equities, fixed income, and alternatives.

title: Apex Real Assets Fund Reaches $42 Billion Milestone
content: Apex's Real Assets Fund, focusing on infrastructure and real estate investments across Asia Pacific, reached $42 billion in assets under management. The fund completed 8 new infrastructure platform acquisitions in 2026, bringing its total portfolio to 28 platform companies generating stable, long-term returns for investors.

title: Apex Appointed to Major Sovereign Wealth Fund Advisory Council
content: Apex CEO Hiroshi Tanaka was appointed to the investment advisory council of a major regional sovereign wealth fund, reflecting the firm's expertise and influence in global asset management. The appointment recognizes Apex's 32-year track record of delivering consistent risk-adjusted returns across multiple asset classes and geographies.
